title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
